root.description: Private couple memory, timeline, and planning app.
root.title: PhuocAnh

chat.description: The private thread between the two of you.

games.description: Playful couple prompts and mini games.

hero.description: A boutique photo book, a travel journal, and a quiet planning space for two.

login.helper: Use your magic link to continue back into your private couple keepsake space.
login.inviteHint: If this is your second account, ask your partner for an invite link and open <link>accept invite</link>.

acceptInvite.helper: Accept your partner invite link to join the shared space.

acceptInvite.title: Join your couple space

login.emailDescription: Use the email linked to your couple space.

acceptInvite.tokenDescription: Token is prefilled from your partner invite URL.

invite.invalidOrUsed: Invite is invalid or already used.

magicLink.sent: Check your email for the magic link.
magicLink.unreachable: Cannot reach Supabase Auth. Ensure local Supabase is running and reachable at port 54321.

auth.signInRequired: Please sign in before accepting an invite.

memory.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max size is 25MB.

memory.unsupportedType: Only image and video files are supported.

actions.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.schemaCommandsDescription: Local migrations are missing. Run these commands, then reload:

header.description: A story ribbon for your recent chapters, with images, notes, and dates that feel like keepsakes instead of rows.
header.quote: Little details become the chapters you keep reopening.
header.title: Latest chapters

timelineEmpty.description: Start your timeline with a note, photo, or short video and it will appear here like a collectible chapter.
timelineEmpty.title: No memories yet

empty.description: Add places, food, or movies that should become your next chapter together.
empty.title: Nothing saved yet

empty.description: Create a shared list for your next trip, dinner, or tiny weekly ritual.
empty.title: No checklist yet

header.description: Keep your couple plans and todos in one place.
header.title: Shared lists

empty.description: Add places, food, or movies you want to try together.
empty.title: No wish items yet

empty.description: Create a checklist for your next trip or weekend.
empty.title: No checklists yet

header.description: A ceremonial little recap surface for the same date across earlier years.
header.quote: Open the sealed keepsakes from this date and let the day fold back in.
header.title: On this day

stackedReveal.chapterCount: {count, plural, =0 {No chapters} one {# chapter} other {# chapters}}
stackedReveal.title: Sealed keepsakes

empty.description: When this date has memories, they will appear like opened keepsakes here.
empty.title: No memories for today yet

header.description: Save a moment with note, photo, or short video.
header.title: Add memory

story.empty: No note was added for this chapter yet.
story.label: Story note

media.label: Attached media
media.loadErrorDescription: Signed URL is unavailable for this media.
media.noneDescription: No image or video was attached to this memory.
media.title: Visual keepsakes

header.description: A warm conversation canvas for the two of you, designed to feel private and unhurried.
header.quote: The thread should feel like passing little keepsakes back and forth.
header.title: Chat

chat.note: This is a designed conversation surface for the upcoming chat feature. Real messages, presence, and media attachments are intentionally not wired yet.

header.description: A soft atlas surface where places, routes, and memories blend into one travel chapter.
header.quote: Routes should feel remembered, not engineered.
header.title: Places map

header.description: Plan and revisit your shared journeys with trip timelines and albums.
header.title: Trips

comingSoon.description: Trip editing, stop-by-stop timelines, and linked albums will be connected once Phase 2 travel logic is implemented.
comingSoon.title: Trip management

empty.description: When real trip data is available, this panel will show your active and archived journeys.
empty.title: No connected trips yet

header.description: A dedicated trip detail layout with timeline, stops, and album slots.

tripDetail.durationPlaceholder: Sample duration until real data is wired

comingSoon.description: This detail page will become fully data-driven once trip entities and map pins are delivered in Phase 2.
comingSoon.title: Trip timeline and map integration

header.description: Album layout is ready for media grouping, captions, and trip linking.

mediaPlaceholder.description: Photo and video tiles will render here once storage-backed album items are available.
mediaPlaceholder.title: Media grid placeholder

highlightPlaceholder.description: Pinned highlights and captions from this album will appear in this panel.
highlightPlaceholder.title: Highlights placeholder

comingSoon.description: Album entities, upload workflows, and trip associations are planned for the next feature phase.
comingSoon.title: Album data wiring

header.description: Track upcoming birthdays, anniversaries, and trips in one calm timeline.
header.title: Countdowns

comingSoon.description: Recurring reminders, timezone-aware scheduling, and reminder jobs will be connected with countdown data in a later phase.
comingSoon.title: Reminder automation

header.description: Write notes now and unlock them together at a chosen future date.
header.title: Future notes

comingSoon.description: Real encrypted note entries and unlock jobs will be connected once the future-note backend model is delivered.
comingSoon.title: Unlock workflow

header.description: Play memory-based mini games and keep your couple streak alive.
header.title: Games

daily.description: Answer one couple question each day to keep the streak.
daily.title: Daily mode

guess.description: Pick the day of a shared memory from your timeline.
guess.title: Guess mode

games.presentationalNote: This is a presentational game hub. Real prompts, answers, and scoring remain untouched and are not wired yet.

comingSoon.description: Game rounds, prompt generation, and score events will be linked when game backend features are implemented.
comingSoon.title: Game engine integration

header.description: Mode-specific game view structure is ready for prompt and answer flows.

gameMode.placeholder: This route is a structured shell for the selected game mode. Prompt generation, answer capture, and streak updates will connect here in a later phase.

comingSoon.description: All gameplay logic remains unchanged and intentionally unimplemented in this UI-only restructure.
comingSoon.title: Gameplay wiring

header.description: A soft dashboard for fun couple activity metrics.
header.title: Stats

comingSoon.description: These widgets are placeholders for event-sourced stats and streak aggregations that will be delivered in Phase 3.
comingSoon.title: Analytics pipeline

header.description: Use this screen as the 'More' hub for secondary sections while core logic remains unchanged.
header.title: Settings and extras

settings.description: This settings page currently acts as the mobile and desktop More entry. Account/privacy controls will be added in a future phase.

comingSoon.description: Preference controls and profile-level settings remain out of scope for this UI-only pass.
comingSoon.title: Settings controls

placeholders.anniversary: An anniversary-worthy page waiting for a little note.
placeholders.compact: A quiet note from this day.
placeholders.featured: One small note can turn this day into a chapter you return to.

chatThread.composerPlaceholder: Write something warm, playful, or tiny.

messages.m1: I still keep thinking about the little cafe in Hoi An.
messages.m2: The lamp light made everything feel unreal. We should go back for two nights.
messages.m3: Saving that as our next mini trip plan.
messages.m4: And I want one more photo in that yellow hallway.

header.description: The map becomes part scrapbook, part itinerary, part memory drawer.
header.title: Places that changed the story

daLat.note: Rain, strawberries, and the walk back when the town felt all blush and fog.
daLat.title: Da Lat

daNang.note: Ocean air, a slow evening, and one of your favorite photos together.
daNang.title: Da Nang

hoiAn.note: Lantern light, too many snacks, and a promise to stay longer next time.
hoiAn.title: Hoi An

empty.description: Add a memory and this chapter surface will begin to fill with images, dates, and the little details that make your space feel alive.
empty.title: Start your first keepsake

anniversarySpotlight.quoteFallback: A small private world made from ordinary days, soft plans, and moments worth keeping.
anniversarySpotlight.since: Together since {date}. Built from late-night notes, ordinary breakfasts, and the chapters you keep choosing to revisit.
